strings.0x102080: Neo wakes up. The sky is lime green.
strings.0x1020a8: Morpheus is wearing a cardboard box instead of a trench coat.
strings.0x1020e8: Morpheus: 'Neo! The Architect ran out of budget! The simulation is falling apart!'
strings.0x102140: Morpheus: 'Take this digital admin tool. Type [drop_axe] to sever glitch branches!'
strings.0x102198: [SCENE 1] A flying killer lawnmower buzzes violently toward your face.
strings.0x102218: [SUCCESS] You drop the ax on the execution thread!
strings.0x102250: The lawnmower turns into a harmless rain of rubber ducks.
strings.0x102290: [GLITCH] You tried to dodge, but tripped over a stray virtual spoon.
strings.0x1022d8: The lawnmower nips your leather jacket. Matrix Stability drops!
strings.0x102320: [SCENE 2] Agent Smith steps out of a phone booth wearing a sparkling pink tutu.
strings.0x102370: Smith: 'Mr. Anderson... do you like my pirouette?'
strings.0x1023a8: He spins rapidly, generating a localized code tornado that blocks your exit.
strings.0x102428: [SUCCESS] CRASH! The ax cuts the tutu's rendering logic.
strings.0x102468: Smith turns neon blue, textures fail, and he falls through the floor geometry.
strings.0x1024b8: [GLITCH] You applaud politely. Smith gets self-conscious, turns red,
strings.0x102500: and slaps you with a copy of the Matrix sequels. Severe logic damage!
strings.0x102548: [SCENE 3] The Architect appears on a massive CRT monitor, sipping a tiny juice box.
strings.0x1025a0: Architect: 'Ergo, concordantly, vis-a-vis, your execution cycle is garbage collected.'
strings.0x1025f8: The screen begins to freeze up. The core kernel is locking! Last chance!
strings.0x1026e8: BOOM! You drop the ultimate ax on the core kernel connection.
strings.0x102758: You wake up in the real world, safe on the Nebuchadnezzar, eating cold porridge.
strings.0x102818: You panicked. The Architect forces you to read his complete dictionary.
strings.0x102860: Your brain melts instantly. The system completely crashes.
